hero.title:
AI inference,
routed openly
hero.sub: Decentralized inference gateway powered by community GPUs. Transparent billing, Lightning payments, 100% open source.
feat.title: Why RouteCat?
feat.sub: Everything a closed gateway does, but you can read every line of code.
feat.open.p: Gateway, billing, routing — all public on GitHub. Audit the code that handles your money.
feat.ln.p: Providers earn sats automatically. Users pay per token. No accounts, no credit cards, no middlemen.
feat.route.p: Requests are routed to the best available node by model, VRAM, queue depth, and region.
feat.bill.p: Per-token pricing, 5% flat fee, every job logged in SQLite. No hidden charges.
feat.api.p: Drop-in replacement for the OpenAI API. Change one line — your base URL — and it works.
feat.priv.p: No accounts, no emails, no tracking. We don't log your prompts or responses. Provider nodes never know who you are. Your API key is your only identity.
feat.comm.p: Anyone with a GPU can join as a provider. Earn Bitcoin from idle compute. No lock-in.
priv.title: Your prompts are yours
priv.body: RouteCat acts as a privacy proxy between you and the inference nodes. We don't store, log, or inspect your prompts or responses. Provider nodes never see your identity — they only receive the raw inference request. No emails, no sign-ups, no cookies. Your API key is the only link to your account, and it's generated locally with no personal data attached.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.sub: Pay per token. Providers keep 95%, gateway takes 5%.
pricing.note: 10 free playground requests per day. Top up with Lightning for API access.
calc.title: What can you do with your sats?
calc.note: Estimate based on output tokens. Actual usage depends on prompt length and response complexity.
api.title: API
api.sub: OpenAI-compatible. Works with any SDK or curl.
account.title: Your Account
account.sub: Get an API key. Top up with Lightning. Check your balance.
account.nokey.desc: Create a free API key to try the playground (10 requests/day), or enter an existing key.
account.nokey.name: App name (optional)
account.login.label: Already have a key?
account.login.err.format: Invalid key format — must start with rc_
account.key.desc: This key will not be shown again. If you lose it, you lose access to any funds deposited. Copy it and store it safely.
account.topup.label: Top up:
account.topup.range: Amount must be between 10 and 100,000 sats
pg.title: Playground
pg.sub: Try it live. No sign-up needed for a quick test.
pg.default: Explain what RouteCat is in one paragraph.
pg.nokey: Create an API key in the Account section above first.
prov.title: Run a node
prov.sub: Got a GPU? Earn Bitcoin by serving inference.
prov.quickstart.text:
1. Install Ollama and pull a model
2. Install Owlrun (our fork with multi-language dashboard)
3. Edit ~/.owlrun/owlrun.conf
4. Restart — start earning sats
faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How does RouteCat protect my privacy?
faq.a1: RouteCat acts as a proxy between you and the inference nodes. Your prompts and responses are forwarded in real time and never stored. Provider nodes only see the raw model request — they don't know who you are. No emails, no cookies, no tracking. Your API key is your only identity, and it carries no personal information.
faq.q2: How can I verify the gateway is honest?
faq.a2: Three ways: (1) The code is open source — read it yourself. (2) The /v1/stats endpoint shows the exact git commit hash of the running binary — you can rebuild from source and compare. (3) The /v1/audit endpoint shows all completed jobs with token counts, earnings, and fees — no hidden charges.
faq.a3: Providers set a Lightning address and a payout threshold (in sats). When their earned balance exceeds the threshold, the gateway automatically sends a Lightning payment. Providers keep 95% of every job — the gateway takes a flat 5% fee. All payouts are verifiable on-chain via the payment hash.
faq.q4: How do I pay for API access?
faq.a4: Create an API key (free, 10 playground requests/day). For API access, top up your balance by paying a Lightning invoice — any amount from 10 to 100,000 sats. Your balance is deducted per-token based on the model's pricing. No subscriptions, no minimum commitments.
faq.q5: What happens if I lose my API key?
faq.a5: Your API key is shown only once when you create it. If you lose it, you lose access to any remaining balance. There is no recovery mechanism — this is by design, as we don't collect any personal data to verify your identity. Always save your key securely.
faq.q6: Is RouteCat compatible with OpenAI SDKs?
faq.a6: Yes. Set base_url="https://route.cat/v1" and your API key in any OpenAI-compatible client (Python, Node.js, curl). Streaming, chat completions, and model listing all work the same way.
footer.oss: RouteCat is open source under MIT license.
